name: PortAventura World Parks & Resort
description: PortAventura World is an entertainment resort in Salou and Vila-seca, Tarragona, on the Costa Daurada in Catalonia, Spain.  It was built around the PortAventura Park theme park, which attracts around 5. 3 million visitors per year, making it the most visited theme park in Spain and the sixth most visited theme park in Europe.
